title: Velenje、Velenje — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Velenje、Velenjeの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

VelenjeはVelenjeにある人口25,000の都市です。A modern planned city in the Šalek Valley, built after WWII for the mining industry, known for its socialist-era architecture, the Velenje Castle, and Lake Velenje.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
